title: carpha elongata
intro: Carpha elongata, also known as long-stalked club-rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Carpha elongata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for treating colds and flu. Carpha elongata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
